sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, addSeconds(event_time, 60) AS updated_time FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = addSeconds(event_time, 120) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, addSeconds(toDate('2023-01-01'), 86400) AS next_day FROM test_dates;
